params.vttTxHash: The BridgeWithdraw transaction hash on VTT chain (prevents replay)

depositUSDT(uint256,bytes32).notice: Deposit USDT to receive vUSDT on VTT chain.         Locks USDT in this contract and emits event for relayer.

depositWVTT(uint256,bytes32).notice: Deposit wVTT to receive VTT on VTT chain.         Burns wVTT and emits event for relayer.

releaseUSDT(bytes32,address,uint256).notice: Release USDT to recipient after verified burn on VTT chain.

releaseWVTT(bytes32,address,uint256).notice: Release wVTT to recipient after verified burn on VTT chain.
